The server didn't start properly. Let me restart it.

---

Cancelled

---

_**User**_

@Cursor (npm run dev) (1-23) 
wtf is this

---

_**Agent (model claude-4.5-opus-high, mode Agent)**_

This error is related to a sandbox restriction. The `uv_interface_addresses` syscall is being blocked, which prevents Next.js from detecting network interfaces to display the local network URL.

This is happening because my shell command ran in a sandboxed environment. The server might actually still be running despite this error message - it's just failing to get the network address info.

Let me try running it without the sandbox restriction:

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: npm run dev</summary>

```bash
npm run dev
```
</details>
</tool-use>

---
